model_role_note: rollout agents constrained to the skill text only; judge agents blind to skill version, scoring against the ground-truth fact sheet.
static_scorecard_note: scorecard rated the AHR pack 94.0/100 while the submission skill omitted every verified review-process / acceptance / timeline fact and led an agent to a wrong notes estimate.

wrong_facts: Estimated notes at ~3,750 words ('half the text') for a 7,500-word article; AHR's typical 8,000-word article carries 4,500-5,500 words of notes, so ~4,200-5,200 is normal
missed_needs: Reviewer count (>=6 scholars per published article) deflected to 'verify on page'
Review-filter share (~25% sent for full review) deflected
Acceptance odds (~8-10% of ~360/year) - 'cannot give realistic chances'

edits.summary: Add verified review process (>=6 reviewers per published article; ~a quarter sent for full review), the 6-8 month decision timeline, the ~8-10%-of-~360 acceptance rate, and the concrete notes budget (typical 8,000-word article carries 4,500-5,500 words of notes), correcting the naive half-the-text estimate.
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 39 -> 100 on held-out Q1-Q3; corrected one wrong fact, added four verified facts

result: ahr-submission held-out behavioral score 39 -> 100 (+61). Static scorecard unchanged (~94).
